## What & why

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this change and why? -->

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## How I tested it

<!-- Commands you ran, what you observed. "Ran `ruff check` and `pytest`" is fine for small changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I linked the issue this addresses (`Closes #N`)
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes (or I explained which tests are affected)
- [ ] I did **not** modify the backend or research pipeline (`src/intertemporal/geoapp/**`,
      `scripts/intertemporal/**`, `src/activation_patching/**`) — or I flagged it explicitly below
- [ ] New `.py` files are multi-word (e.g. `temporal_export.py`, not `export.py`)
